content: Next.js 16 Cache Components: cacheComponents:true makes ALL caching opt-in via 'use cache' directive; by default every route/component/function is dynamic at request time. searchParams reading outside a Suspense boundary forces dynamic rendering of that segment (moving access into a Suspense-wrapped component lets the rest prerender). For pagination, args/closures become part of cache key automatically. Source: nextjs.org/docs/app/api-reference/directives/use-cache, nextjs.org/docs/app/guides/migrating-to-cache-components
